scripts.dev:local: bunx concurrently -k -n convex,apps -c blue,green "bun run --cwd apps/dashboard convex:dev" "turbo dev --parallel --filter=@tamias/api --filter=@tamias/dashboard --filter=@tamias/worker"
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:api:production: cd apps/api && bun run deploy:cf -- --env production
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:api:staging: cd apps/api && bun run deploy:cf -- --env staging
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:dashboard:production: cd apps/dashboard && bun run deploy:cf -- --env production
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:dashboard:staging: cd apps/dashboard && bun run deploy:cf -- --env staging
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:worker:production: cd apps/worker && bun run deploy:cf:bridge -- --env production && bun run deploy:cf:capture -- --env production && bun run deploy:cf:ledger -- --env production
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:worker:staging: cd apps/worker && bun run deploy:cf:bridge -- --env staging && bun run deploy:cf:capture -- --env staging && bun run deploy:cf:ledger -- --env staging
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:website:production: cd apps/website && bun run deploy:cf -- --env production
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:website:staging: cd apps/website && bun run deploy:cf -- --env staging
scripts.preflight:cloudflare:worker: cd apps/worker && bun run preflight:cf:bridge && bun run preflight:cf:capture && bun run preflight:cf:ledger
scripts.preflight:cloudflare:worker:staging: cd apps/worker && bun run preflight:cf:bridge:staging && bun run preflight:cf:capture:staging && bun run preflight:cf:ledger:staging
scripts.preflight:cloudflare:worker:production: cd apps/worker && bun run preflight:cf:bridge:production && bun run preflight:cf:capture:production && bun run preflight:cf:ledger:production
scripts.preflight:cloudflare:staging: bun run preflight:cloudflare:api:staging && bun run preflight:cloudflare:dashboard:staging && bun run preflight:cloudflare:website:staging && bun run preflight:cloudflare:worker:staging
scripts.preflight:cloudflare:production: bun run preflight:cloudflare:api:production && bun run preflight:cloudflare:dashboard:production && bun run preflight:cloudflare:website:production && bun run preflight:cloudflare:worker:production
scripts.preflight:cloudflare: bun run preflight:cloudflare:api && bun run preflight:cloudflare:dashboard && bun run preflight:cloudflare:website && bun run preflight:cloudflare:worker
